sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39938" key="e)pikuli/des" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπικῠλίδες</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδων</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">αἱ</gen>, <sense id="n39938.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">upper eyelids</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:66" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.66</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κύλα</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
